scripts.render: set -a && . ../../../.env && set +a && : ${MODELS_D1_ID:?MODELS_D1_ID missing} && envsubst '${CF_ACCOUNT_ID} ${MODELS_D1_ID}' < wrangler.toml.template > wrangler.toml
scripts.dev: npm run render && set -a && . ../../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: npm run render && set -a && . ../../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN wrangler deploy
scripts.domain: npm run render && set -a && . ../../../.env && set +a && curl -fsS -X PUT https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$CF_ACCOUNT_ID/workers/domains -H "Authorization: Bearer $CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"environment":"production","hostname":"models.compose.market","service":"models","zone_id":"1e15c817645029697921095d54be2cec"}'
scripts.schema: npm run render && set -a && . ../../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN wrangler d1 execute models --file=schema.sql --remote
scripts.schema:local: npm run render && wrangler d1 execute models --file=schema.sql --local
scripts.secrets: npm run render && set -a && . ../../../.env && set +a && env -u CF_ACCOUNT_ID -u CF_API_TOKEN -u CF_API_KEY -u CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL -u CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=$CF_ACCOUNT_ID CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=$CF_GLOBAL_TOKEN bash -c 'for k in MONGO_DB_API_KEY; do test -n "${!k}" || { echo "$k missing" >&2; exit 1; }; echo "setting $k"; printf %s "${!k}" | wrangler secret put "$k"; done'
